candidates.title: Modern Album Logo & Cover Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I’m getting ready to release a new project and need a striking album cover that also doubles as a recognisable logo for all my promo materials. Visually, I’m after a clean modern aesthetic—nothing vintage or overly ornate—powered by bright, bold colours that jump off the screen and still look sharp in print. Here’s what I’m thinking: • One cohesive artwork that can serve as the streaming-service cover, social banner crop, and profile thumbnail. • A logo or word-mark element extracted from the main design so I can use it on merch and posters. • Final files supplied in layered PSD/AI, plus ready-to-post PNG and JPEG versions in both 3000×3000 px (for Spotify/Apple) and scalable vector for print. Acceptance criteria: – Design clearly reads at both large and thumbnail sizes. – Colour palette stays vivid and consistent across RGB and CMYK exports. – All fonts converted to outlines or included

candidates.title: Jewellery Branding & Poster Design
candidates.brief: Looking for a Budget-Friendly Branding & Poster Designer for a Jewellery Startup We are a growing jewellery startup looking for a creative and experienced graphic designer who can help us build a strong brand identity within a reasonable budget. Scope of Work: * Jewellery store branding * Shop name board design * Outdoor and indoor signage boards * Promotional posters and banners * Social media branding images * Marketing creatives for print and digital use * Basic brand identity design We already have a few reference designs and ideas that will help guide the creative direction. We are looking for someone who can understand our vision and create professional, premium-looking designs that match the jewellery industry. Requirements: * Experience in branding and advertising design * Ability to create luxury and elegant jewellery-related visuals * Good communication and willingness to work

candidates.title: Desain Grafis & Artikel Blog
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: Saya sedang membuka peluang kerja lepas untuk membantu saya menambah penghasilan melalui konten visual dan tulisan pendukung yang siap dijual atau dipublikasikan. Apa yang saya butuhkan: • 5–7 aset desain grafis orisinal (banner, poster, feed Instagram, atau template digital lain) lengkap dengan file sumber terbuka—Adobe Illustrator atau Photoshop. • 5 artikel atau posting blog (300-500 kata per artikel) yang relevan dengan masing-masing desain, ditulis dalam Bahasa Indonesia yang lugas dan menarik. • Setiap desain dan artikel harus benar-benar orisinal, bebas hak cipta, serta mudah disesuaikan untuk klien atau marketplace berbeda. Kriteria keberhasilan: – Visual terlihat profesional di desktop maupun perangkat seluler. – Teks informatif, tanpa kesalahan tata bahasa, dan mengandung kata kunci kreatif yang alami. – Semua berkas terstruktur rapi, diserahkan dalam format .ai/.psd serta .png

candidates.title: Seafood Business Branding Graphics
candidates.brief: I need a talented designer to create a suite of promotional materials for my seafood business. The goal of these designs is to enhance our brand awareness. Required Designs: - Posters - Banners - Fliers - Instagram Posts Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proven graphic design experience - Strong portfolio - Social media graphic creation expertise - Creativity and a keen eye for aesthetics - Ability to incorporate brand elements consistently across all designs Looking for a designer who can bring my seafood brand to life visually and help us stand out in the market. Please share your previous work and relevant experience.

candidates.title: A1 Modern Event Promo Poster -- 2
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator · InDesign — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I need a clean, modern-looking A1 poster that promotes an upcoming event and finishes with the clear call-to-action “Contact us for services.” The overall feel should be sleek rather than vintage or playful, so think ample white space, bold typography, and a refined colour palette that will stand out at large format while staying professional. Please work at full A1 dimensions with 3 mm bleed in CMYK so the file is press-ready. I’m comfortable if you design in Adobe Illustrator, InDesign, or Photoshop; just be sure all fonts are outlined or supplied and images are hi-res. Deliverables: • Print-ready PDF (A1, CMYK, 300 dpi, bleed & crop marks) • Layered source file (AI/PSD/INDD) for future edits • Small web preview (JPG or PNG) for online sharing Once the first draft is in, I’ll provide any event specifics—logo, date, and contact details—for you to drop in. candidates.title: Event Promotion Poster Design
candidates.tools: Photoshop · Illustrator — for print-ready CMYK output and scalable vector artwork
candidates.brief: I need a striking poster that will promote an upcoming event to a professional audience and work equally well on office walls and across our social channels. The design must translate cleanly from print (A3 and A4, CMYK, 300 dpi) to web (optimized JPEG/PNG for LinkedIn and email). Please craft a polished, business-oriented look—think clear hierarchy, crisp typography and a colour palette that feels modern yet formal. Feel free to weave in subtle graphic elements or icons that hint at innovation and leadership; the event theme centres on professional growth. You will receive the event title, copy, brand colours and logo once we start. I’m happy to collaborate on layout ideas, but I expect a visually balanced composition that draws the eye without feeling cluttered.
